text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Now, which tea shall I have to start the day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That sound... My favorite cup cracking... I know I
was dreaming, but I'll not forget that sound so
easily.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...I can only hope that dream does not reoccur.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ardan's nightmare leaves her in low spirits.
